title: Richea milliganii
taxonomy: Richea milliganii is classified within the family Ericaceae and is a species of flowering plant. It is native to Australia and is considered an endemic species of the country. The plant belongs to the genus Richea, which is a group of plants that are commonly known as 'bog saws' or 'bog herbs'. Richea milliganii is further classified as a member of the Richea scoparia group within the Ericaceae family. This classification is based on its morphological and molecular characteristics.
